chunks.text: NexusAI is a multi-modal assistant. The secret launch code is ALPHA-99. It supports voice, image, and RAG.

Data Science is the field of extracting insights and knowledge from structured and unstructured data. It combines statistics, machine learning, data analysis, and domain expertise to solve real-world problems. Machine Learning is a subset of Artificial Intelligence that enables systems to learn from data and improve their performance without being explicitly programmed. It focuses on building models that can make predictions or decisions. Artificial Intelligence refers to the broader concept of machines performing tasks in a way that mimics human intelligence. It includes areas such as machine learning, natural language processing, and computer vision. Python is a popular programming language widely used in data science, machine learning, web development, and automation due to its simplicity and extensive libraries. A dataset is a structured collection of data used for analysis or training machine learning models. It can contain numerical values, text, images, or other types of information. Supervised learning is a type of machine learning where models are trained using labeled data. The model learns to map input data to the correct output. Unsupervised learning is a type of machine learning where the model identifies patterns and relationships in data without labeled outputs. Overfitting occurs when a machine learning model learns the training data too well, including noise and outliers, resulting in poor performance on new data. A neural network is a computational model inspired by the human brain. It consists of layers of interconnected nodes and is used in deep learning. Deep learning is a subset of machine learning that uses neural networks with multiple layers to model complex patterns in large datasets. Accuracy is a performance metric used to evaluate machine learning models. It represents the proportion of correct predictions out of total predictions. Training data is the dataset used to train a machine learning model so it can

uses neural networks with multiple layers to model complex patterns in large datasets. Accuracy is a performance metric used to evaluate machine learning models. It represents the proportion of correct predictions out of total predictions. Training data is the dataset used to train a machine learning model so it can learn patterns and relationships. Testing data is used to evaluate the performance of a trained model on unseen data. Natural Language Processing (NLP) is a field of Artificial Intelligence that focuses on the interaction between computers and human language, including text and speech processing. A chatbot is a software application designed to simulate human conversation. It can be used for customer support, information retrieval, and automation of communication tasks. Feature engineering is the process of selecting, modifying, or creating new input variables to improve the performance of machine learning models. Model evaluation involves assessing the performance of a machine learning model using metrics such as accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score. Data preprocessing is the step where raw data is cleaned and transformed into a suitable format for analysis or model training. Big data refers to extremely large datasets that cannot be processed efficiently using traditional methods and require advanced tools and technologies. Cloud computing provides on-demand computing resources such as storage and processing power, often used in data science and machine learning workflows.
AI & Machine Learning Curriculum 30-Session Plan (Tabular Format)

Crowd Management System Project Report 1. Introduction The Crowd Management System is an automated hardware and web-based project designed to control and monitor the movement of people at entry and exit points. The main objective of this project is to reduce manual management and improve safety, efficiency, and crowd control in public places. This system uses Arduino, Servo Motors, LEDs, Sensors, and a Website Interface to automate the opening and closing of entry and exit gates. The gates operate automatically based on detection, making the system useful for schools, malls, events, offices, railway stations, and other crowded areas. The project demonstrates the practical implementation of automation and embedded systems in real-life crowd management applications. 2. Objectives of the Project The major objectives of the Crowd Management System are: To automate entry and exit gate operations. To reduce manual crowd handling. To improve crowd monitoring and management. To provide controlled access using sensors and Arduino. To indicate gate status using LED indicators. To maintain digital records through the website. To enhance safety and efficiency in crowded areas. 3. Problem Statement Managing crowds manually in public areas can create confusion, delays, and safety issues. During peak hours, it becomes difficult to control entry and exit movement efficiently. Human management may also lead to errors and improper monitoring. To solve this issue, an automated crowd management system is developed using Arduino, servo motors, sensors, and a website interface. The system controls the gates automatically and provides visual indications using LEDs while maintaining records digitally.• • • • • • • 1 4. Components Used Component Name Quantity Purpose Arduino UNO 1 Main controller of the system Servo Motor 2 To open and close entry and exit gates LEDs 4 Status indication for gate operation IR Sensors 2 Detect movement at gates Jumper Wires

digitally.• • • • • • • 1 4. Components Used Component Name Quantity Purpose Arduino UNO 1 Main controller of the system Servo Motor 2 To open and close entry and exit gates LEDs 4 Status indication for gate operation IR Sensors 2 Detect movement at gates Jumper Wires Multiple Connections between components Breadboard 1 Circuit setup USB Cable 1 Power and programming Power Supply 1 To operate the system Website Interface 1 Digital management and monitoring 5. Hardware Description Arduino UNO Arduino UNO is the main microcontroller used in this project. It processes the sensor input and controls the servo motors and LEDs according to the program. Servo Motor Servo motors are used for automatic gate movement. One servo motor controls the entry gate and another controls the exit gate. LEDs LEDs are used as indicators: Green LED indicates gate open condition. Red LED indicates gate closed condition. IR Sensors IR sensors detect the presence of a person near the gate and send signals to the Arduino for further processing.• • 2 6. Website Module Description Along with the hardware system, a website interface is developed for better crowd management and digital record maintenance. The website contains the following modules: Entry Form The Entry Form is used to store and manage visitor entry details. It helps maintain records of people entering the premises. Features Visitor information submission Entry record management User-friendly interface Digital monitoring system Exit Form The Exit Form is used to manage and track exit details of visitors leaving the premises. Features Exit data recording Visitor tracking Automated management process Easy monitoring system Lost and Found Form The Lost and Found Form is designed to report lost items and help users recover their belongings. Features Report lost items Submit found item details Easy data management Quick

of visitors leaving the premises. Features Exit data recording Visitor tracking Automated management process Easy monitoring system Lost and Found Form The Lost and Found Form is designed to report lost items and help users recover their belongings. Features Report lost items Submit found item details Easy data management Quick information access The website improves the overall management process by maintaining digital records and reducing paperwork.• • • • • • • • • • • • 3 7. Working Principle The Crowd Management System works on the basis of sensor detection and automated gate control. When a person approaches the entry gate, the IR sensor detects movement. Arduino receives the signal from the sensor . The servo motor rotates and opens the entry gate. Green LED turns ON indicating the gate is open. After a few seconds, the gate closes automatically. Red LED turns ON indicating the gate is closed. The same process works for the exit gate. The website stores entry and exit information digitally. Users can also submit lost-and-found details using the website. This automation helps in smooth crowd movement and reduces manual effort. 8. Circuit Connections Entry Gate Connections Servo Motor Signal Pin → Arduino PWM Pin Red LED → Arduino Digital Pin Green LED → Arduino Digital Pin IR Sensor Output → Arduino Input Pin Exit Gate Connections Servo Motor Signal Pin → Arduino PWM Pin Red LED → Arduino Digital Pin Green LED → Arduino Digital Pin IR Sensor Output → Arduino Input Pin 9. Advantages of the System Reduces manual crowd

9. Software Used Software Purpose Arduino IDE Programming and uploading project logic Website Interface Entry and exit management Embedded C / Arduino Language System programming1. 2. 3. 4. 5. 6. 7. 8. 9. • • • • • • • • 4 10. Advantages of the System Reduces manual crowd handling. Improves safety and management. Automatic gate control. Easy to use and cost-effective. Real-time indication using LEDs. Digital record maintenance. Website integration for monitoring. Suitable for public places and institutions. 11. Applications The Crowd Management System can be used in: Shopping malls Schools and colleges Railway stations Airports Hospitals Event management areas Offices and companies Public gathering locations 12. System Features Automated entry gate control Automated exit gate control LED status indication Servo motor gate operation Sensor-based detection system Website integration for management Lost and found reporting system Real-time monitoring Simple and efficient operation• • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • 5 13. Future Improvements The system can be improved in the future by adding: Face recognition system RFID card access Mobile application support Cloud database integration AI-based crowd analysis Real-time live monitoring dashboard Emergency alert system 14. Conclusion The Crowd Management System is an efficient and automated solution for managing crowd movement at entry and exit points. The system successfully uses Arduino, servo motors, LEDs, sensors, and a website interface to automate gate operations. The integration of website forms for entry, exit, and lost-and-found management makes the project more advanced and practical for real-world applications. This project reduces manual effort, improves safety, and provides better crowd monitoring. The project demonstrates the importance of automation and embedded systems in modern management systems. 15. About PCTE College Introduction PCTE Group of Institutes is a well-known private educational institution located in Ludhiana, Punjab, India. The institution is recognized for providing quality education, industry-oriented training, and practical learning experiences across multiple academic disciplines. Since its establishment, PCTE has focused on developing students’ technical knowledge, professional skills, creativity, leadership abilities, and overall personality development. The institution aims to bridge the gap between academic learning and industry requirements by offering modern education systems, practical exposure, workshops, industrial training, and project-based learning methodologies. PCTE has built a reputation for encouraging innovation, entrepreneurship, research activities, and technical excellence among students. The college provides a learning environment where students can improve their academic knowledge as well as practical and communication skills. Academic Programs PCTE offers various undergraduate and postgraduate programs in different professional and technical fields. The institution is mainly recognized for the following streams: Engineering The Engineering department focuses on technical education, innovation, software development, hardware systems, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and project-based learning. Students are encouraged to participate in coding competitions, technical events, robotics activities, and real-world project development. Management The Management programs help students develop leadership skills, business understanding, teamwork, communication abilities, and entrepreneurial thinking. Students gain knowledge in areas such as marketing, finance, human resources, and business operations. Computer Applications The Computer Applications department provides knowledge in programming, database management, web development, software engineering, cloud computing, data science, cybersecurity, and Artificial Intelligence technologies. Students are trained in both theoretical and practical concepts. 1 Hotel Management The Hotel Management department focuses on hospitality services, food production, tourism management, event management, customer service, and professional communication skills. Students receive practical exposure through training sessions and industry interaction. Pharmacy The Pharmacy programs focus on pharmaceutical sciences, healthcare systems, medicine preparation, laboratory practices, and medical research. Students gain both academic and

Management department focuses on hospitality services, food production, tourism management, event management, customer service, and professional communication skills. Students receive practical exposure through training sessions and industry interaction. Pharmacy The Pharmacy programs focus on pharmaceutical sciences, healthcare systems, medicine preparation, laboratory practices, and medical research. Students gain both academic and practical knowledge related to the healthcare industry. Fashion Design The Fashion Design department encourages creativity, innovation, and design thinking. Students learn about garment construction, textile design, fashion trends, styling, and creative presentation techniques. University Affiliation PCTE is affiliated with IK Gujral Punjab Technical University (IKGPTU) for many academic programs. The institution follows university academic guidelines, examination structures, and curriculum standards. The affiliation helps students receive recognized degrees and industry-relevant education aligned with modern technological and professional requirements. Practical Learning Approach One of the major strengths of PCTE is its practical learning methodology. The institution believes in combining classroom teaching with hands-on practical exposure. Students are encouraged to work on: Live projects Research activities Industrial training Technical workshops Internship programs Innovation-based competitions Startup and entrepreneurship activities This approach helps students gain practical experience and prepares them for real-world industry challenges.• • • • • • • 2 Technical Activities and Competitions PCTE actively promotes technical growth and innovation among students. The institution organizes and supports various activities such as: Coding competitions Hackathons Robotics competitions AI and Machine Learning projects Web development competitions Technical seminars Research presentations Software development projects Innovation and startup events These activities help students improve problem-solving abilities, teamwork, communication skills, and technical expertise. Internship and Placement Support The college provides internship and placement support to help students build successful careers. Students receive guidance for: Resume building Interview preparation Aptitude training Group discussion sessions Technical interview practice Industry interaction programs Internship opportunities Placement drives The Training and Placement Cell

communication skills, and technical expertise. Internship and Placement Support The college provides internship and placement support to help students build successful careers. Campus Environment PCTE provides a student-friendly and professional learning environment. The campus supports academic development, extracurricular participation, technical growth, and personality improvement.• • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • 3 The institution organizes: Cultural events Technical festivals Educational seminars Workshops and training programs Sports activities Innovation exhibitions Student engagement activities These events help students develop confidence, communication abilities, leadership skills, and teamwork. Industry-Oriented Education The institution focuses on providing industry-oriented education by introducing modern technologies and practical tools into the learning process. Students gain exposure to: Artificial Intelligence Machine Learning Data Science Cloud Computing Software Development Internet of Things (IoT) Cybersecurity Full Stack Development This helps students stay updated with current technological trends and industry demands.• • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • 4 Conclusion PCTE Group of Institutes is a modern educational institution that focuses on academic excellence, technical innovation, practical learning, and student development. Through quality education, industry exposure, technical activities, internships, and project-based learning, the institution helps students prepare for professional careers and future

• • • • • • 4 Conclusion PCTE Group of Institutes is a modern educational institution that focuses on academic excellence, technical innovation, practical learning, and student development. Through quality education, industry exposure, technical activities, internships, and project-based learning, the institution helps students prepare for professional careers and future opportunities. The college continues to support students in building technical knowledge, communication abilities, leadership qualities, and real-world problem-solving skills for successful professional growth. 5
